ddls:
CREATE TABLE "name_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each name record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the name was recorded */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gender of the name */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the name was recorded */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the baby */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of the name in the given year and state */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the data */,
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ethnic background associated with the name */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the name in the given year and state */,
  "total_count" INTEGER /* Total count of names recorded in the given year and state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_name_records_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_name_records_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_name_records_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_name_records_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES genders ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the state is located (e.g., Northeast, Midwest) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the state's data */,
  "state_population_year" INTEGER /* Population of the state for the year the data was recorded */,
  "state_area" INTEGER /* Area of the state in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "is_unisex" INTEGER /* Indicates if the name can be used for both genders */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year recorded */,
  "decade" TEXT /* Decade of the year for easier trend analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., U.S. Census Bureau, State Health Department) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the source */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., survey, birth records) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "name_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the name record the metadata belongs to */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes on the data collection or any relevant information */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the metadata was last updated */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "data_collection_location" TEXT /* Location where the data was collected */,
  "data_collection_responsibility" TEXT /* Person or organization responsible for the data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_name_metadata_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES name_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin, public) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the name record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the record */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES name_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "name_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the baby */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the trend started */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the trend ended */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend (e.g., rising, falling) */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., popularity, decline) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the trend data */,
  "peak_year" INTEGER /* Year when the name reached its peak popularity */,
  "peak_count" INTEGER /* Count of the name in the peak year */,
  "trend_confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the trend (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_name_trends_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)
